---
title: "HW2"
author: "Omama"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## CO2 dataset

This dataset has 84 observations of 5 variables, two of them are numeric and three are categorical.

## Varaibles

The *Plant* variable is a factor with 12 levels and each level has 7 observations.

```{r CO2 1}
table(CO2$Plant)
length(table(CO2$Plant))
```

The variables *Type* and *Treatment* are categorical and each one of them has two categories.

```{r CO2 2}
table(CO2$Type)
table(CO2$Treatment)
```

The *conc* variable is numeric and it has min 95, max 1000, and mean = 435.

```{r CO2 3}
summary(CO2$conc)
```

The *uptake* variable is numeric and it has min 7.7, max 45.5, and mean = 27.21.

```{r CO2 4}
summary(CO2$uptake)
```

## Histograms

```{r CO2 5, echo = F}
par(mfrow=c(1, 2))
hist(CO2$conc)
hist(CO2$uptake)
par(mfrow=c(1, 1))
```

#kholoud 
```{r CO2 6}
barplot(table(CO2$Type))
```
